name: Cheese Logs
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut off the ends of a loaf of white bread and roll it thin.
2. Spread the cream cheese mixture evenly over the bread.
3. Roll up the bread from corner to corner.
4. Dip the log in melted margarine, then in cinnamon sugar.
5. Place on an ungreased cookie sheet.
6. Bake at 350°F for about 10 minutes until browned.
